title: Base editing restores CDKL5 expression and rescues neuronal deficits in a patient-derived model of CDKL5 deficiency disorder
authors: Chai Y, Zhu Y, Zhu J, Guan M, Zheng Z, Chen Y, Tsang HWS, Ye T, Ip JPK
abstract: Base editing restores CDKL5 expression and rescues neuronal deficits in a patient-derived iPSC model of CDKL5 deficiency disorder. Uses adenine base editing (ABE) for gene correction in iPSC-derived neurons.
